ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geophysical_data" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "depth_ft" REAL /* Depth of measurement in feet */,
  "cali_in" REAL /* Caliper measurement in inches */,
  "gr_gapi" REAL /* Gamma Ray measurement in GAPI units */,
  "at10_ohm_m" REAL /* Resistivity at 10 feet in Ohm.m */,
  "at20_ohm_m" REAL /* Resistivity at 20 feet in Ohm.m */,
  "at30_ohm_m" REAL /* Resistivity at 30 feet in Ohm.m */,
  "at60_ohm_m" REAL /* Resistivity at 60 feet in Ohm.m */,
  "at90_ohm_m" REAL /* Resistivity at 90 feet in Ohm.m */,
  "dtco_us_f" REAL /* Time delay for compression in microseconds/foot */,
  "dtsm_us_f" REAL /* Time delay for shear in microseconds/foot */,
  "npor" REAL /* Porosity measurement */,
  "npor_percent" REAL /* Porosity percentage */,
  "rhob_g_c3" REAL /* Bulk density in grams per cubic centimeter */,
  "tnph" REAL /* Total Natural Porosity */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the depth */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey during which the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geophysical_data_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geoscientist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES geophysical_data ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with this quality metric */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., on a scale of 1 to 10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality of the data */,
  "quality_method" TEXT /* Method used to assess the quality */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assessed the quality */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES geophysical_data ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., resistivity, porosity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the dataset was collected */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey during which the dataset was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., in-house, third-party) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES measurement_sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with this version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the versioned dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date on which the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
